summary: Gangnam swept UFP across all 3 subs (갑 태구민 58.40, 을 박진 50.94, 병 유경준 65.38), holding the conservative wall even against the strong DPK wave. 을's 4.5pp margin shows some erosion but core class/apartment factors held. 태구민 (formerly North Korean diplomat 태영호) was a high-profile defector candidate.

issues.label: Wealth / class composition
issues.description: Gangnam's income concentration insulates against national waves.

issues.label: Real-estate politics
issues.description: High-rise apartment density anchors conservative real-estate preferences.

issues.label: Conservative identity
issues.description: Held conservative even against pro-Moon wave; ideological consistency clear.
